---
title: "Isabella Sydney Yonge"
---

## Isabella Sydney Yonge

**Dates:** (b.Ireland 1860/1-1954)

**Maiden name:** (Bowen)

### Description

wife of CMY\'s cousin Duke Mohun Yonge

### Biography

She married Duke Yonge, who was 9 years her junior, in 1890.

### Letters

- Letter from April 3d [1900]
- Letter from March 30th [1900]
- Letter from March 27 [1900]
- Letter from March 24 [1900]
- Letter from Sept 17th [1897]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
